data.body:
How do you do, fellow NES kids?

The NES has twelve games with "Kid" in its title.
That's four times as many as the Super NES or Genesis, who only have three "Kid" games each.

data.body:

My rule: No price, no buy.

data.body:
A bit late to the party, but happy #portfolioday ! 🥳
I'm Luisa, a fantasy illustrator for book covers and MtG cards. I also mentor beginner and advanced artists.

I take commissions from self publishing authors from time to time, if the project fits. Email me, link in bio.

#fantasyart #bookcoverart
